sections.title: Frequently asked questions
sections.description: Can't find what you need? Email hello@supa.page.

items.question: Can I use my own domain?
items.answer: Yes — `/domain-add example.com` registers it and prints the DNS records to add. HTTPS issues automatically once DNS propagates.

items.question: Where are my sites hosted?
items.answer: On a single Hetzner ARM VPS in Falkenstein. Backups go to Cloudflare R2. We'll add multi-region when uptime needs justify the cost.

items.question: What's the limit on the free plan?
items.answer: One site. Pro is $19/mo for up to 10 sites + analytics.
